rationale: Educ. Code §49.304 governs taxation of personal property at locations annexed by school districts. It does not reference or depend on the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Personal property having a taxable situs at the same location as real property detached and annexed under this subchapter is taxable by the school district to which the real property is annexed.
_note: No conflict; rule text concerns personal property taxation in annexation contexts, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
